zh.Northumberland, England: 英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德
zh.Rode, Frome, Somerset, England: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特洛德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Laurence de St. Maur of Road, Keeper of Jedburgh Castle於大約1245年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特洛德時，他的父親Nicholas de Saint Maur24歲，母親Isabel de Saint Maur22歲。他於1280年與Sibilla Morwick在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1297年2月16日在英國瓦維其可爾素坦享年53歲。

zh-hans.Northumberland, England: 英国英格兰諾圖波藍德
zh-hans.Rode, Frome, Somerset, England: 英国英格兰薩默塞特洛德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Laurence de St. Maur of Road, Keeper of Jedburgh Castle于大约1245年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特洛德时，他的父亲Nicholas de Saint Maur24岁，母亲Isabel de Saint Maur22岁。他于1280年与Sibilla Morwick在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1297年2月16日在英国瓦維其可爾素坦享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: St.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Southern French: variant of   St  .   Romain  .

meanings: Southern French: variant of   St  .   Romain  .

variants.name: Romain
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Alain, Altagrace, Aurore, Camille, Dominique, Edele, Georges, Henri, Jacques, Jean-Marie, Jean-Michel, Jeanmarie.
French, West Indian (mainly Haiti), and English: variant of   Roman  .

nameMeanings.name: Maur
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Cecile, Chantal, Christophe, Jean-Luc, Lucien, Marcel, Michel, Monique, Phillippe, Sylvanie.  Spanish Jose, Ruben, Carlos, Manuel, Alvaro, Antolin, Luis, Miguel, Pedro, Ramon, Roberto, Salvador.
French (mainly southern): from a regional variant of the personal name   Maurin  .
French: from a shortened form of the personal name Amaury (see Amery ).

variants.name: Maurin
meanings: French: from a medieval personal name derived from the Latin name Maurinus, a derivative of Maurus ‘Moor’ (see Mauro ), which was the name of a 6th-century Christian martyr. This form of the surname is also found in Germany, Italy, and Slovenia (see below). Compare Morin .

Germanized or Americanized form of Slovenian Mavrin: from a personal name derived from the Latin name Maurinus (see above). In part, Maurin is a Gottscheerish (i.e. Gottschee German) surname, originating from the Kočevsko region in Lower Carniola, Slovenia (see Kocevar ).
Italian: rare variant of   Maurino  , a cognate of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Laurence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a French form of Latin Laurentius ‘man from Laurentum’. Laurentum was a town in Latium, which may have got its name from Latin laurus ‘laurel’, although it is more probably of pre-Roman origin. The given name was moderately popular in the Middle Ages (when it was used for girls as well as boys), under the influence of a 3rd-century saint who was one of the seven deacons of Rome. He was martyred in 258 . The legend is that, having been required to hand over the Church's treasures to the civil authorities, he assembled the poor and sick and presented them. For this act of Christian defiance, he was roasted to death on a gridiron. In England the name is also associated with St Laurence of Canterbury ( d. 619 ). A more recent influence has been the actor Sir Laurence Olivier ( 1907–89 ). See also Lawrence .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Laurence de St. Maur of Road, Keeper of Jedburgh Castle was born about 1245, in Rode, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, Nicholas de Saint Maur, was 24 and his mother, Isabel de Saint Maur, was 22. He married Sibilla Morwick in 1280, in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 16 February 1297, in Southam, Warwickshire, England, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Laurence de St. Maur of Road, Keeper of Jedburgh Castle est né environ 1245, à Rode, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Nicholas de Saint Maur, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Saint Maur, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Sibilla Morwick en 1280, à Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 16 février 1297, à Southam, Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Laurence de St. Maur of Road, Keeper of Jedburgh Castle um 1245 in Rode, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas de Saint Maur 24 und seine Mutter Isabel de Saint Maur 22. Er hat 1280 in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom Sibilla Morwick geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 16. Februar 1297 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Southam, Warwickshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Laurence de St. Maur of Road, Keeper of Jedburgh Castle è nato il circa 1245 nel Rode, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Nicholas de Saint Maur, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Isabel de Saint Maur, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Sibilla Morwick nel 1280, nel Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 16 febbraio 1297, nel Southam, Warwickshire, England, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Laurence de St. Maur of Road, Keeper of Jedburgh Castleが約1245年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトロドで生まれた時，父Nicholas de Saint Maurは24歳，母Isabel de Saint Maurは22歳であった。1280年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドでSibilla Morwickと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1297年2月16日にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアソウサムで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Laurence de St. Maur of Road, Keeper of Jedburgh Castle(이)가 대략 1245년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 로드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas de Saint Maur(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel de Saint Maur(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1280년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드에서 Sibilla Morwick(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1297년 2월 16일 영국 워윅실르 소우섬에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Laurence de St. Maur of Road, Keeper of Jedburgh Castle nasceu aproximadamente 1245, em Rode, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Nicholas de Saint Maur, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Saint Maur, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Sibilla Morwick em 1280, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 16 de fevereiro de 1297, em Southam, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Laurence de St. Maur of Road, Keeper of Jedburgh Castle родился около 1245 г. в местности род, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Nicholas de Saint Maur было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Saint Maur, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Sibilla Morwick в 1280 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 16 февраля 1297 г. в местности соутам, варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Laurence de St. Maur of Road, Keeper of Jedburgh Castle nació aproximadamente 1245, en Rode, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Nicholas de Saint Maur, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Isabel de Saint Maur, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Sibilla Morwick en 1280, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 16 de febrero de 1297, en Southam, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años.
